content:
✔ Why This Works:
✔ Prevents too many players from shifting their archetypes, keeping roles consistent.
✔ Forces students to strategize and wait for the right moment to purge.
✔ Creates tension—students must decide if they want to block another’s purge attempt.

📜 3. Some Group Rituals Require a Class-Wide Vote via Secret Ballot

📜 Certain major class-altering decisions will be made anonymously.

✔ How Secret Ballots Work:
• Votes are cast in secret using a quick method (ex: digital form, private submission, or written slips).
• Only high-stakes decisions (ex: legendary transformations, major faction shifts, permanent exiles) use secret voting.
• If a ritual is denied via secret ballot, the initiator loses something major (ex: XP, an item, or a buff).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 544 (chunk 544/555)
